facilities.name: Environmental Collection Center
facilities.hours: Fort Worth lists current hours on the Environmental Collection Center page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Many services are resident-focused and may be free for eligible Fort Worth residents. Confirm current limits and rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring ID and confirm current resident eligibility, quantity limits, and appointment or load rules before driving.

facilities.name: Southeast Drop-Off Station
facilities.address: 5100 Martin Luther King Freeway, Fort Worth, TX 76119
facilities.hours: Fort Worth posts current Southeast Drop-Off Station hours on the official station page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Some services are limited to residents or specific load types. Confirm current fees and eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the city page to verify accepted items, proof-of-residency rules, and any vehicle restrictions before driving.

facilities.name: Cold Springs Processing & Disposal
facilities.address: 1300 Cold Springs Rd Bldg 2, Fort Worth, TX 76102
facilities.hours: Check the operator listing and TCEQ permit references for current gate hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load size, weight, and waste class. Confirm current rates before arrival.
facilities.rules: Always confirm accepted materials, safety rules, and payment terms before driving.

facilities.name: Waste Management Westside Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Check the operator listing for current transfer station hours.
facilities.fees: Transfer fees vary by material type and load size. Confirm the latest rate sheet before arrival.
facilities.rules: Call ahead to confirm public self-haul access, accepted loads, and any vehicle restrictions before you drive.
